title: ICAI Inaugurates Digital Transformation Finance Summit 2026, Unveils DISA 4.0
content:
# ICAI Inaugurates Digital Transformation Finance Summit 2026, Unveils DISA 4.0

Ek important update hai. The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI), through its Digital Accounting and Assurance Board (DAAB), ne second edition of the Digital Transformation Finance Summit (DxFS) 2026 ka udghatan kiya hai. Is event mein ek major update bhi announce hui hai.

*   The **Digital Transformation Finance Summit (DxFS) 2026** was inaugurated, focusing on crucial areas like Forensic Accounting, Cybersecurity, and Digital Trust.
*   The summit was held on **May 22nd and 23rd, 2026**, in Hyderabad.
*   A key highlight was the introduction of **DISA 4.0**, the upgraded version of ICAI's Post Qualification Course on Information Systems Audit.
*   **DISA 4.0** has been designed to equip Chartered Accountants with advanced capabilities in Cybersecurity Audit, Data Protection, Risk, Cloud Audit, Technology Risk Management, Regulatory Compliance, and Digital Trust. This future-ready programme adopts a practical, modular, and blended learning approach.
*   The summit aimed to deliberate on emerging challenges and opportunities in the digital economy, creating awareness and preparedness in areas such as cybersecurity, digital personal data protection, forensic accounting, information systems audit, and cybercrime prevention.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.icai.org/events/Digital-Transformation-Finance-Summit-2026)

*Published on: 25 May 2026*
